Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1 Understand the Users Request Input A DECLARE process model represented as a Python dictionary Context Loan application review process Sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace might influence decisions Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo Task Add new DECLARE constraints to mitigate bias Requirements Identify potential bias Add constraints coexistence response succession non-succession etc to enforce fairness Preserve the exact dictionary format with support 1.0 confidence 1.0 Output the updated dictionary and a brief rationale Constraints in DECLARE Unary existence absence exactly_one init and Binary responded_existence coexistence response precedence succession etc Input Model Structure Keys are constraint types values are dicts mapping source activity to target activity or just activity for unary each with support confidence

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2 Analyze the Input Model declare_model with existence StartApplication FinalDecision init StartApplication coexistence StartApplication FinalDecision response StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision and other constraint types empty

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3 Identify Potential Bias and Design Mitigations Bias Scenario A decision FinalDecision Approve Reject happens too quickly after checking sensitive attributes CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge or without a fairness check BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Mitigation 1 Non-succession Prevent direct succession from sensitive attribute checks to decisions Eg CheckApplicantRace Reject use nonsuccession Mitigation 2 Coexistence Ensure that if a decision is made on a sensitive applicant Reject a ManualReview must occur in the same trace use coexistence Mitigation 3 Response or Succession Ensure that after a sensitive attribute check a BiasMitigationCheck must occur before a decision use response or precedence Mitigation 4 Absence Non-existence enforce that Reject cannot occur immediately after CheckApplicantRace without BiasMitigationCheck but nonsuccession is good

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Define concrete activities Sensitive checks CheckRace CheckGender CheckAge Mitigation steps BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Decisions Approve Reject Design constraints 1 nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace Reject 2 coexistence Reject ManualReview 3 response CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck 4 precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision 5 nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace FinalDecision Refine to match DECLARE semantics nonsuccession A cannot be immediately followed by B coexistence A and B always appear together response If A occurs B must occur later precedence If B occurs A must have occurred earlier

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Map them to the dictionary structure nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace Reject support 1.0 confidence 1.0 coexistence Reject ManualReview response CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision Add for other attributes CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge similarly Add existence for new activities ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge Approve Reject

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Draft the updated model keep original constraints add to existence new activities add to coexistence Reject ManualReview add to response CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck etc add to precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision add to nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace Reject etc

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify DECLARE semantics response A precedes B if A occurs B later precedence A precedes B if B occurs A earlier nonsuccession A cannot immediately followed by B coexistence A and B always together Format matches prompt examples All constraints use support 1.0 confidence 1.0

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self-Correction Refinement Should I add existence for new activities Yes Add nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace FinalDecision but stick to Reject focused on biased outcome to rejection All set Structure check Output matches requirements
